name: Kagura (Netorare)
description:
HARD NTR / It is possible to prevent NTR (all characters are over 18)

The story takes place during feudal Japan, in a large city named Ajiko (fictional city). In this city is one of the largest fighting clans in the world, the Yato clan

Your wife is named Kagura, she is an outstanding fighter, and she is also the future leader of her clan. You are her husband, a young man from a merchant family known throughout the world

Despite her fighting skills, Kagura lacks experience in other areas, to do this her clan has decided to recruit an old man named Koraru, he is 60 years old, he is a former merchant, but also a politician and strategist, and even a fighter in his spare time. He is known throughout the world for his knowledge

Thus begins your adventure, the old man wants to expand his hold on the Yato clan and to do this he wants to steal your wife and your place as husband in the Yato clan. Could you protect the Yato and Kagura clan from this man ?

Artist : kunaboto
creator: Chax45
